message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "title": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey 2018 (Erwerbstätigenbefragung 2018)",
      "year": 2018,
      "provider": "GESIS - Data Archive",
      "country": "Germany",
      "topics": [
        "Working conditions",
        "Occupational health",
        "Workplace safety",
        "Job demands",
        "Working time"
      ],
      "description": "Representative survey of employees in Germany focusing on working conditions, occupational safety and health, physical and psychosocial workloads, ergonomics, accidents, and work organization."
    },
    {
      "title": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey 2012 (Erwerbstätigenbefragung 2012)",
      "year": 2012,
      "provider": "GESIS - Data Archive",
      "country": "Germany",
      "topics": [
        "Working conditions",
        "Occupational health",
        "Workplace safety",
        "Job demands",
        "Work organization"
      ],
      "description": "Nationwide employee survey capturing working conditions and occupational health indicators in Germany, including physical and psychosocial stressors, safety practices, and work organization."
    },
    {
      "title": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey 2006 (Erwerbstätigenbefragung 2006)",
      "year": 2006,
      "provider": "GESIS - Data Archive",
      "country": "Germany",
      "topics": [
        "Working conditions",
        "Occupational health",
        "Workplace safety",
        "Workload",
        "Ergonomics"
      ],
      "description": "Survey of employed persons in Germany examining working conditions and occupational safety and health, including exposure to physical and psychosocial risks and work environment characteristics."
    },
    {
      "title": "lidA Cohort Study – Work, Age, Health (Wave 1, 2011)",
      "year": 2011,
      "provider": "GESIS - Data Archive",
      "country": "Germany",
      "topics": [
        "Occupational health",
        "Working conditions",
        "Aging workforce",
        "Work stress",
        "Health outcomes"
      ],
      "description": "First wave of the German cohort study on work, age, and health (lidA), assessing employment conditions, psychosocial and physical workloads, and health among older workers."
    },
    {
      "title": "lidA Cohort Study – Work, Age, Health (Wave 2, 2014)",
      "year": 2014,
      "provider": "GESIS - Data Archive",
      "country": "Germany",
      "topics": [
        "Occupational health",
        "Working conditions",
        "Aging workforce",
        "Work stress",
        "Health trajectories"
      ],
      "description": "Second wave of the lidA cohort study following older workers to analyze changes in working conditions and their impact on health and employment over time."
    },
    {
      "title": "lidA Cohort Study – Work, Age, Health (Wave 3, 2018)",
      "year": 2018,
      "provider": "GESIS - Data Archive",
      "country": "Germany",
      "topics": [
        "Occupational health",
        "Working conditions",
        "Aging workforce",
        "Longitudinal health",
        "Work ability"
      ],
      "description": "Third wave of the lidA cohort study examining longitudinal relationships between evolving working conditions and health outcomes among older employees in Germany."
    }
  ]
}
